message:
Fix 15 issues in plan document (review findings)

Critical fixes:
- Add limit/bundle/format flags to parseFlags function
- Fix __dirname → import.meta.dir for Bun compiled binaries
- Add EmbeddedPrompt TypeScript interface with snake_case fields
- Add /api/embeddings route for web semantic search

Medium fixes:
- Extract hash embedder to shared module (hash-embedder.ts)
- Fix WASM import to use dynamic fetch from public/wasm/
- Add VERSION constant from package.json
- Restructure CI to build WASM before web (add needs: dependency)
- Add embedding generation and semantic search smoke test to CI

Minor fixes:
- Add jfp export command implementation
- Update WASM build script with size optimization (wasm-opt)
- Consolidate project structure (Part 14.9 references Part 5)
- Add cass GitHub link to ecosystem docs
- Update documentation-suite bundle to be honest about growing collection

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
